systems.system_notes: Mobile-bearing partial knee arthroplasty platform for unicompartmental knee replacement.

trays.tray_notes: Official Oxford materials describe a dedicated partial knee workflow and implant system with its own operative instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official Oxford materials describe the femoral component within the partial knee construct.
Official Oxford materials describe the tibial component within the partial knee construct.
Official Oxford materials explicitly describe the mobile bearing feature of the system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Oxford materials define implant families and construct philosophy but do not expose a compact SKU table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
